name: igz-mgmt

metadata.name: igz-mgmt
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Python SDK For Iguazio Management API

documentation:
# igz-mgmt-sdk

SDK for Iguazio Management API

## Installation

Igz-mgmt can be installed by running `pip install igz-mgmt`.

## License

Apache License, Version 2.0

## Documentation

Please see [Documentation](https://iguazio.github.io/igz-mgmt-sdk/) for more information

modules.name: igz_mgmt.cruds
documentation:
This module represents CRUD operations.

Using a CRUD-like HTTP client, we can: get, list, create, update, and delete resources,
and trigger operations against the Iguazio System.

functions.name: igz_mgmt.common.helpers.create_linear_backoff
documentation: Create a generator of linear backoff. Check out usage example in test_helpers.py.

functions.name: igz_mgmt.common.helpers.retry_until_successful
documentation:
Runs function with given *args and **kwargs.

Tries to run it until success or timeout reached.

Args:
    backoff: can either be a:
        1. number (int / float) that will be used as interval.
        2. generator of waiting intervals. (support next()).
    timeout (int): Pass None if timeout is not wanted, number of seconds if it is.
    logger: A logger so we can log the failures.
    verbose (bool): Whether to log the failure on each retry.
    function: Function to run.
    **args: Functions args.
    **kwargs: Functions kwargs.

Returns:
    Function result.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.constants.SslVerificationMode

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.constants.SslVerificationMode.none
documentation:
Performs no verification of the server’s certificate.
This mode disables many of the security benefits of SSL/TLS and should only be used after cautious consideration.
It is primarily intended as a temporary diagnostic mechanism when attempting to resolve TLS errors.
Its use in production environments is strongly discouraged.

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.constants.SslVerificationMode.full
documentation:
Verifies that the provided certificate is signed by a trusted authority (CA)
and also verifies that the server’s hostname (or IP address) matches the names identified within the certificate.
Controls the verification of filebeat server certificates.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.close
documentation: Closes the client connection.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.login
documentation:
Authenticates to the API server using username and password.

Args:
    username (str): The username to log in with.
    password (str): The password to log in with.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.with_access_key
documentation:
Sets the access key to be used for authentication.

Args:
    access_key (str): The new access key.

Returns:
    APIClient: The client protocol.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.create
documentation:
Creates a new resource.

Args:
    resource_name (str): The resource name.
    attributes: The resource attributes.
    relationships (optional): The resource relationships. None by default.
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.update
documentation:
Updates an existing resource.

Args:
    resource_name (str): The resource name.
    resource_id: The resource ID
    attributes: The resource attributes.
    relationships (optional): The resource relationships. None by default.
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.delete
documentation:
Deletes an existing resource.

Args:
    resource_name (str): The resource name.
    resource_id: The resource ID
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.delete_by_attribute
documentation:
Deletes an existing resource by resource attribute.

Args:
    resource_name (str): The resource name.
    attribute_name (str): The identifying attribute in the resource to be deleted.
    attribute_value (str): The value of the resource attribute to delete by.
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.detail
documentation:
Gets an existing single resource.

Args:
    resource_name (str): The resource name.
    resource_id: The resource ID to delete
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.list
documentation:
Lists existing resources.

Args:
    resource_name (str): The resource name.
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.request
documentation:
Executes a raw request.

Args:
    method: The request method.
    path: The request path.
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.tenant_id
documentation:
Authenticated session tenant id.

Returns:
    tenant id

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.username
documentation:
Authenticated username.

Returns:
    username

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.version
documentation:
Iguazio system version info.

Returns:
    semver.VersionInfo: Iguazio version

methods.name: igz_mgmt.client.APIClient.version
documentation:
Change Iguazio system version info.

Args:
    value (semver.VersionInfo): Iguazio version

Client protocol to communicate with the Iguazio system.

Args:
    endpoint (str, optional): system endpoint.
    timeout (int, optional): protocol timeout.
    retries (int, optional): number of retries for a request before failing.
    username (str, optional): username to log in the system.
    password (str, optional): password to log in the system.
    access_key (str, optional): control plane access key for the Iguazio system.

modules.name: igz_mgmt.operations
documentation:
Below are classes which do not have a corresponding resource in the API but represent operations.

Some endpoints within the management API are considered “operations”,
which means that the response may not represent a resource.
Some operations are long-living, which means a background job is created whereas the response will hold its id.
Copyright 2023 Iguazio
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
You may obtain a copy of the License at
http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.operations.ClusterConfigurations

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.ClusterConfigurations.reload
documentation:
Cluster configuration reload.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    config_type (ConfigTypes): The configuration type.
Cluster configuration operations.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.operations.ManualEvents

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.ManualEvents.emit
documentation:
Emits a manual event.

This operation requires system-admin role permissions.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    event (ManualEventSchema): The event to emit.
    audit_tenant_id: The assigned tenant id for auditing events (required for audit events).
    kwargs: Additional arguments to pass to the request.
Manual event operations.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.get
documentation:
Gets the app service that matches the given spec name.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): The name of the app service spec.

Returns:
    AppServiceBase, optional: The app service instance that matches the given spec name.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.create_or_update
documentation:
Creates or updates an app service.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service (AppServiceSpec or AppServiceBase): app service to create or update.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.restart
documentation:
Restarts an app service.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to restart.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.remove
documentation:
Removes an app service.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to remove.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.enable
documentation:
Enables an app service.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to enable.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.disable
documentation:
Disables an app service.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to disable.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices.scale_from_zero
documentation:
Scales an app service from zero.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to scale from zero.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

methods.name: igz_mgmt.operations.AppServices._change_service_state
documentation:
Changes an app service desired state.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service.
    service_state (AppServiceDesiredStates): App service state
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete.

Returns:
    Job, optional: The job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False

Raises:
    AppServiceNotExistsException: If app service not exists
Syntactic sugar to AppServicesManifest class.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ResourceBaseModel

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ResourceBaseModel.from_orm_with_client
documentation: Creates a new instance from an ORM object and init the http client.
Base model for all resources.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.resources.BaseResource

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.BaseResource.get
documentation:
Gets the resource record.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    resource_id (int or str): Record id.
    include (typing.List[str], optional): Include related resources. None by default.

Returns:
    BaseResource: The resource record.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.BaseResource.list
documentation:
Lists resource records.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    filter_by (typing.Mapping[str, str], optional): Filter by field values. None by default.
    sort_by (typing.List[str], optional): Sort by field names. None by default.
    paging (ResourceListPagingQueryParams, optional): Allow to paginate resource by given records size.
    None by default.
    include (typing.List[str], optional): Include related resources. None by default.

Returns:
    typing.List[BaseResource]: List of records for the specific resource.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.BaseResource.update
documentation:
Updates resource record.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    relationships (optional): The resource relationships. None by default.
    **kwargs: additional arguments to pass to the request.

Returns:
    BaseResource: The updated record.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.BaseResource.delete
documentation:
Deletes resource record.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    ignore_missing (bool, optional): When True, don't raise an exception in case the record does not exist.
    False by default.
    wait_for_job_deletion (bool, optional): Whether to wait for the job to complete. True by default.

Returns:
    Job, optional: the job that was created or None.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.BaseResource._get_resource_by_name
documentation:
Gets a resource by name, by listing all resource instances and filtering by name.

If resource is not found, ResourceNotFoundException is raised
Base resource contains common attributes and methods for resources in the system.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectMembershipResource.ensure_project_membership
documentation:
Ensures that the current object is a member of a project with a specific role.

Args:

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectMembershipResource.remove_from_project

Args:

classes.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.create
documentation:
Creates a new User.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    username (str): The user username.
    password (str, optional): The user password. None by default. (if not provided, an email is automatically
    sent to the user to set his password)
    assigned_policies (typing.List[TenantManagementRoles], optional): The assigned policies of the group.
    None by default.
    primary_group (str or Group or None): None by default.
    groups (typing.Union[typing.List[str], typing.List["Group"], None], optional): A list of group objects
    or group ids to add user to the groups. None by default.
    timeout (int, optional): The default is 30.
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete
    phone_number (str, optional): The user phone number.
    job_title (str, optional): The user job title.
    department (str, optional): The user department.
    authentication_methods (typing.List[UserAuthenticationMethods], optional): The authentication method
    type to log in with. None by default.

Returns:
    User

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.is_operational
documentation:
Verify user is operational.

Verifying that the user operational status is up and that the all_users group
exists in the user_groups relationships.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.

Returns:
    bool: True if user is operational, False otherwise.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.get_by_username
documentation:
A convenience method to get a user by username.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    username (str): The user username.
    include (optional): Include related resources. None by default.

Returns:
    User: The user instance by username.

Raises:
    ResourceNotFoundException: If user is not found

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.self
documentation:
Gets the current user.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.

Returns:
    User: The current user instance.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.in_group
documentation:
Checks if user is part of a group.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    group (str or Group): The group id or group instance to check if user is part of it.

Returns:
    bool: True if user is part of the group, False otherwise.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.get_project_effective_role
documentation:
Gets the effective roles of the user in a project.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    project_name (str): The project name.

Returns:
    list: The effective roles of the user in the project.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.add_to_group
documentation:
Adds a user to a group.

1. get the user
2. add the group to the user
3. update the user

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    group (str or Group): The group id or group name or group instance to add user into it.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.remove_from_group
documentation:
Removes a user from a group.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    group (str or Group): The group id or group name or group instance to remove user from it.
    force (bool): force (bool): Whether to force the removal of the user from the group (for example, from its
                                primary group).

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.get_primary_group
documentation:
Gets the primary group of a user.

Args:

Returns:

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.set_primary_group
documentation:

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    group (str or Group): The primary group id or group name or group instance.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.disable
documentation:
Disables the user instance.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.disable_by_username

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.enable

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.enable_by_username
documentation:
Enables the user by username.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.enable_by_id
documentation:
Enables the user by user id.

Args:

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User.enable_user

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.User._ensure_user_in_group
documentation:
Ensures that a user has a group in its relationships.

e.g.:
If group is not in user relationships, add it and return True
Alternatively, if group is in user relationships, return False

Returns:
    bool: True if the group was added to the user relationship, False otherwise.
User resource represents user in the system.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Group

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Group.create
documentation:
Creates a new group.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    name (str, optional): Group name.
    assigned_policies (typing.List[TenantManagementRoles], optional): The assigned policies of the group.
    None by default.
    description (str, optional): The description of the group. None by default.
    gid (int, optional): The gid of the group (leave empty for auto-assign). None by default.
    users (typing.List[typing.Union[int, str, User]], optional): A list of User objects or user ids
    to add to the group. None by default.

Returns:
    Group

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Group.get_by_name
documentation:
A convenience method to get a group by name.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    name (str): Group name.
    include (optional): Include related resources. None by default.

Returns:

Raises:
    ResourceNotFoundException: If group is not found

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Group.add_user
documentation:
Adds a user to group.

1. get the user
2. add the group to the user
3. update the group

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    user (str or int or User): The user id or username or user instance to add.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Group.remove_user
documentation:
Removes a user from group.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    user (str ot int or User): The user id or username or user instance to remove.
    force (bool): force (bool): Whether to force the removal of the user from the group(for example, from its
                                primary group).
Group resource represents user group in the system.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.resources.AccessKey

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.AccessKey.create
documentation:
Creates a new access key.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    planes (typing.List[SessionPlanes], optional): The planes of the access key.
    label (str, optional): The label of the access key.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.AccessKey.get_or_create
documentation:
Get or create access key.

If access key with the given planes exists, it will be returned.
Otherwise, a new access key will be created.
If no planes are given, all planes will be used.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    planes (typing.List[SessionPlanes], optional): The planes of the access key.
    label (str, optional): The label of the access key.

Returns:
    AccessKey: An existing or newly created access key.

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.resources.AccessKey.ttl
documentation: 10 years

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.resources.AccessKey.expires_at
documentation: EPOCH
AccessKey resource represents access key in the system.

documentation: This method is forbidden.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Job.update
documentation: This method is forbidden.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Job.wait_for_completion
documentation:
Wait for a job to be finished.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    job_id (str): The job id.
    job_completion_retry_interval (float, optional): The default is 30.
    timeout (int, optional): The default is 3600.

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Job.max_total_execution_time
documentation: in seconds

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Job.max_worker_execution_time
documentation: in seconds

class_variables.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Job.delay
documentation: in seconds

Job is an abstraction for long-running operations in the API.

Some operations, cannot be finished within a reasonable amount of time for a normal HTTP request.
Job has a state, id and can be awaited on asynchronously.

Sets the apply mode of the app services manifest.

Gets the app service that matches the given spec name.

Creates or updates an app service.

Removes an app service.

Args:

    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to remove
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete

Returns:

documentation:
Scales an app service from zero.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    app_service_spec_name (str): Name of the app service to scale from zero
    wait_for_completion (bool): Whether to wait for the job to complete

Returns:
    Job, optional: the job that was created or None if wait_for_completion is False.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.AppServicesManifest._apply
documentation:
Apply the current state of the manifest to the API.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    wait_for_completion (bool, optional): Whether to wait for the job to complete. True by default.
    force_apply_all_mode (ForceApplyAllMode, optional): Disabled by default.

Returns:
    Job: the job that was created.
AppServicesManifest resource.

    role (igz_mgmt.constants.ProjectAuthorizationRoles): The role name.
    add_member_mode (igz_mgmt.constants.AddMemberMode, optional): Add member mode, default: fail_on_existing

Add members to a specific role.

Args:
    http_client (igz_mgmt.client.APIClient): The client to use.

    role (igz_mgmt.constants.ProjectAuthorizationRoles): The role name.

documentation:
Remove a member from the roles.

Args:
    http_client (igz_mgmt.client.APIClient): The client to use.
    member (typing.Union[User, Group]): The member to delete.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet.remove_members

Remove members.

Args:
    http_client (igz_mgmt.client.APIClient): The client to use.
    members (typing.List[typing.Union[User, Group]]): The members to remove.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet.set_members
documentation:
Overrides the existing role members with the given members.

Args:
    http_client (igz_mgmt.client.APIClient): The client to use.
    members (typing.List[typing.Union[User, Group]]): The members to set.
    role (igz_mgmt.constants.ProjectAuthorizationRoles): The role name.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet.resolve_member_role
documentation:
Find a member in the roles.

Args:
    member (typing.Union[User, Group]): The member to find.

Returns:
    ProjectAuthorizationRole: The role that the member belongs to.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet.apply
documentation:
Apply the changes made to the roles.

This function allows multiple membership changes with a single api call by context manager.
It sets skip apply, yields itself for the context manager so user can run any function without applying,
sets the value back and applies when context manager exists.

Args:
    http_client (igz_mgmt.client.APIClient): The client to use.
    wait_for_job (bool, optional): Whether to wait for the job to finish. Defaults to True.
    notify_by_email (bool, optional): Whether to notify by email. Defaults to False.

Yields:
    ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet: The updated role set.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet._apply
documentation:
Apply the changes made to the roles.

we want to skip apply in those cases:
1. _skip_apply is set to True:
    this is the case when we are in the context manager
2. _changes_detected:
    _changes_detected contains a list of booleans, each boolean represents if there was change in the role.
    we want to skip apply only if _changes_detected is not empty and all the booleans are False.
    if _changes_detected is empty we want to apply because we want by default to apply the changes.
ProjectAuthorizationRoleSet resource represents the set of authorization roles on a certain project.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Project.create
documentation:
Creates a new project.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    name (str): The project name.
    description (str, optional): The project description.
    labels (typing.List[typing.Dict[str, str]], optional): The project labels.
    annotations (typing.List[typing.Dict[str, str]], optional): The project annotations.
    owner (str or User or None): The project owner. None by default

    default_function_node_selector (typing.List[typing.Dict[str, str]], optional): The default node
    selectors to be used for functions in the project. (Supported on Iguazio systems >= 3.5.5)

Returns:
    Project: The project instance.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Project.update
documentation:
Updates project.

Returns:

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Project.delete
documentation:
Deletes resource record.

Args:

    ignore_missing (bool, optional): When True, don't raise an exception in case the record does not exist.
    False by default.
    wait_for_job_deletion (bool, optional): Whether to wait for the job to complete. True by default.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Project.set_members
documentation:
Overrides the existing role members with the given members.

Args:
    http_client (APIClient): The client to use.
    members (List[User or Group]): User instances or Group instances.
    role (ProjectAuthorizationRolesTypes): The role name.
    wait_for_job (bool, optional): Wait for job completion. Defaults to True.
    notify_by_email (bool, optional): Notify by email. Defaults to False.
    override (bool, optional): Override existing members. Defaults to False.

methods.name: igz_mgmt.resources.Project.remove_member

    notify_by_email (bool, optional): Notify by email. Defaults to False.

Requires system-admin role.

Event resource represents events in the system.

Events are used to notify about changes in the system.

classes.name: igz_mgmt.resources.CommunicationEvent
documentation:
CommunicationEvent resource represents internal communication events in the system.

Communication events are used to communicate between internal components within the system.
Their visibility is internal and the classification is usually "sw".

AuditEvent resource represents audit events in the system.

Audit events are used to represent user and system actions within the system
